task: Synthesize roadmap and trust constraints into a concise lane-runtime requirement.
context: Roadmap note: ChatBoks should support three user-configurable BYOM lanes plus an optional Coordinator. Free or cheap model combinations must be viable. GLM-5.2 is a candidate heavy long-context collaborator lane, not a replacement for Claude, Codex, Gemini, or Coordinator. Trust note: Cloud fallback means sending task context to a provider-backed CLI, hosted model, connector, or external service. It requires explicit consent before including secrets, sensitive data, authenticated dashboard screenshots, cross-project memory, or large source snapshots beyond the scoped task. Local models still need scoped prompts and reviewed cache/log behavior.
